description: TikTok is a short-form video and social media platform. Its developer program provides APIs and SDKs for login, content posting, display, embeds, research access, and related integrations.
summary: TikTok exposes public developer HTTP APIs on developers.tiktok.com, including a general Server API v2 plus product-specific Content Posting, Data Portability, and public Embed/oEmbed surfaces; authentication is via developer app credentials exchanged for user or client bearer tokens.
